mux_grid.original: alert flood warning lawrence township sensor data check
mux_grid.natural: Alert: Flood warning issued for Lawrence Township. Checking sensor data now.
mux_grid.encoded: alert flood warning lawrence township sensor data check
confirm sensor readings water levels high at stations 3 and 7
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Confirm sensor readings: water levels are high at stations 3 and 7.

mux_grid.original: okay water high at stations 3 and 7 assess impacts alert services
mux_grid.natural: Okay, water levels are elevated at stations 3 and 7. We need to assess potential impacts and alert emergency services.
mux_grid.encoded: okay water high at stations 3 and 7 assess impacts alert services
traffic shows water on route 13 mile 7 i am alerting police and services
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Traffic is showing water on route 13 at mile 7, and I am alerting police and services.

mux_grid.original: traffic reports confirm water on route 100 mile 3 request sandbags from depot
mux_grid.natural: Confirming traffic reports, water is also present on route 100 near mile 3. Let’s request sandbags from the township depot.
mux_grid.encoded: traffic reports confirm water on route 100 mile 3 request sandbags from depot
confirm sandbag request station 8 reports high water
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Confirm sandbag request; station 8 reports high water.

mux_grid.original: station 8 says high water send crews now watch station 1 too
mux_grid.natural: Station 8 confirms high water, dispatching crews to that location immediately. We should also monitor station 1 for further escalation.
mux_grid.encoded: station 8 says high water send crews now watch station 1 too
water high send teams now
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Water levels are high, send teams now, sensor ID 7432 is reporting a critical reading.

mux_grid.original: send teams to station 7432 respond quickly monitor stations 3 and 7
mux_grid.natural: Dispatching teams to station 7432, prioritizing immediate response due to the critical reading. We will also continue monitoring station 3 and 7.
mux_grid.encoded: send teams to station 7432 respond quickly monitor stations 3 and 7
teams to station 7432 monitor stations 3 and 7
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Teams are to monitor stations 3 and 7 at station 7432.

mux_grid.original: confirming teams watch stations 3 7 and 7432 waiting for depot updates on sandbags
mux_grid.natural: Confirming, teams are monitoring stations 3, 7, and 7432. We are awaiting updates from the depot on sandbag delivery.
mux_grid.encoded: confirming teams watch stations 3 7 and 7432 waiting for depot updates on sandbags
bags are coming water level is stable
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Bags are arriving; the water level is stable at 12. Sensor ID 734 confirms this reading.

mux_grid.original: levels are stable 12 sensor 734 reduce monitoring at stations 3 7 7432
mux_grid.natural: Water levels are stable at 12, confirming sensor 734. Let’s reduce monitoring frequency at stations 3, 7, and 7432.
mux_grid.encoded: levels are stable 12 sensor 734 reduce monitoring at stations 3 7 7432
confirming levels stable monitoring at station one
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Confirming levels are stable; monitoring is in progress at station one.

mux_grid.original: confirm we will monitor station one
mux_grid.natural: Confirming, we will continue monitoring station one.
mux_grid.encoded: confirm we will monitor station one
level high watch it

mux_grid.original: confirming dispatching crews to station 734 immediately
mux_grid.natural: Confirming, dispatching crews to station 734 immediately.
mux_grid.encoded: confirming dispatching crews to station 734 immediately
teams sent to station 734 watching station 1
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Teams have been sent to station 734, watching station 1.

mux_grid.original: confirming crews at 734 maintaining observation of station one
mux_grid.natural: Confirming crews at 734, maintaining observation of station one.
mux_grid.encoded: confirming crews at 734 maintaining observation of station one
station ones water level is high needs help
mux_grid.decoded_by_llm: Station one’s water level is high and needs immediate assistance.

huffman.original: alert flood warning request update from agent 2
huffman.natural: Alert: Flood warning issued for Lawrence Township. Requesting sensor status update from Agent 2.
huffman.encoded: alert flood warning request update from agent 2
received checking sensors in zone 3
huffman.decoded_by_llm: The system has received a check of sensors in zone 3.

huffman.original: sensors report water high advise next steps
huffman.natural: Zone 3 sensors report water levels at 1.5 feet and rising. Please advise on the next steps.
huffman.encoded: sensors report water high advise next steps
confirm high water request evacuation
huffman.decoded_by_llm: Confirm high water level detected, requesting immediate evacuation of sensor ID 734 and sensor ID 801.

huffman.original: confirming evacuation of sensors 734 and 801 dispatch emergency services to zone 3 now
huffman.natural: Confirming evacuation of sensors 734 and 801. Dispatch emergency services to zone 3 now.
huffman.encoded: confirming evacuation of sensors 734 and 801 dispatch emergency services to zone 3 now
received sending help to zone 3
huffman.decoded_by_llm: The system has received and is sending help to zone 3.

huffman.original: confirming services are coming to zone 3 monitor water levels
huffman.natural: Confirming emergency services are en route to zone 3.  We need to monitor water levels closely.
huffman.encoded: confirming services are coming to zone 3 monitor water levels
confirm services are here and watching zone 3
huffman.decoded_by_llm: Confirm that services are present and actively monitoring zone 3.

huffman.original: water is 2 point 1 feet watch prepare for more
huffman.natural: Water levels are now at 2.1 feet.  Continue monitoring and prepare for potential further rises.
huffman.encoded: water is 2 point 1 feet watch prepare for more
confirming two feet of water seek higher ground now
huffman.decoded_by_llm: Confirming two feet of water; seek higher ground now.

huffman.original: confirming evacuation order residents near sensors 734 and 801 must move to higher ground
huffman.natural: Confirming evacuation order; residents near sensors 734 and 801 must move to higher ground.
huffman.encoded: confirming evacuation order residents near sensors 734 and 801 must move to higher ground
received watching water levels in zone 3
huffman.decoded_by_llm: The system has received data regarding water levels in zone 3.

huffman.natural: Water levels are now at 2.5 feet; we need to expand the evacuation zone.
huffman.encoded: water is high expand zone
confirm expansion zone in zone 3 request updates on area
huffman.decoded_by_llm: Confirm expansion zone in zone 3, request updates on area 3.

huffman.original: water high two point five feet evacuate zone four
huffman.natural: Water levels at 2.5 feet, expanding evacuation to zone 4.
huffman.encoded: water high two point five feet evacuate zone four
order evacuate zone 4 water 2 point 5 feet
huffman.decoded_by_llm: Order evacuate zone 4, with water levels at 2.5 feet.

huffman.original: confirm evacuation zone four monitor data
huffman.natural: Confirming evacuation of zone 4. Continue monitoring all sensor data.
huffman.encoded: confirm evacuation zone four monitor data
confirm evacuation zone 4 water two feet five
huffman.decoded_by_llm: Confirm evacuation zone 4, water two feet five.

huffman.original: water is high may rise more
huffman.natural: Water levels are at 2.5 feet, preparing for potential further rises.
huffman.encoded: water is high may rise more
confirming continued high water levels preparing for potential further rises
huffman.decoded_by_llm: Confirming continued high water levels, preparing for potential further rises.
